mapper.insert: insert into tbl_member(member_email, member_password, member_name) values(#{memberEmail}, #{memberPassword}, #{memberName})
insert into tbl_member(member_email, member_password, member_name, member_status) values(#{memberEmail}, #{memberPassword}, #{memberName}, #{memberStatus})
mapper.select: select id, member_email, member_password, member_name, member_status, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_member
